name: Tribeguide
description: You’re the heartbeat of your people, the one people gather around. You spark conversations, set the tone, and make everyone feel like they belong. You lead with personality, insight, humour and heart, others look to you to guide the vibe. You don’t just grow an audience — you grow a community.
htmlDescription:
You’re the heartbeat of your people,
the one people gather around. 
You spark conversations, set the tone,
and make everyone feel like they belong.

You lead with
personality,
insight,
humour
and heart,
others look to you to guide the vibe.

You don’t just grow an audience
— you grow a community.
